name: Operational Events Summary
description: Combines the operational event catalog with live ingest (notifications) or EventBridge imports for quick prioritization.

inputs.name: eventDefinitionIds
inputs.description: Comma- or newline-separated event definition identifiers to monitor.

inputs.name: startTime
inputs.description: UTC start of the ingest window.

inputs.name: endTime
inputs.description: UTC end of the ingest window.

steps.description: Fetch catalog metadata for the requested event IDs.
Query operational events via the audit pipeline or parse imported EventBridge payloads.

outputs.summary: Totals by event definition + severity + service + frequency histogram.
outputs.raw: JSONL of each operational event received.
